_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: For products from countries classified as low risk, operators are "not be required to fulfil the obligations under Articles 10 and 11" (risk assessment and risk mitigation), provided they have ascertained that all relevant commodities come from low-risk countries and that the risk of circumvention or mixing with non-low-risk origin products is negligible.
prior.source_span: When placing relevant products on the market or exporting them, operators shall not be required to fulfil the obligations under Articles 10 and 11 where, after having assessed the complexity of the relevant supply chain and the risk of circumvention of this Regulation or the risk of mixing with products of unknown origin or origin in high-risk or standard-risk countries or parts thereof, they have ascertained that all relevant commodities and relevant products have been produced in countries or parts thereof that were classified as low risk in accordance with Article 29.
